reviews.comment:
Después de una larga y calurosa ruta se agradece encontrar este lugar para descansar un rato y reponer energias. Aqui empieza el lindo paisaje viniendo desde el Chaco

(Translated by Google)
After a long, hot drive, it's a welcome relief to find this place to rest and recharge. The beautiful scenery begins here, coming from the Chaco region.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJXzRHWTVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es el mejor parador en Ojo de Agua. Solo que creo q se abusan con los precios del kiosko

(Translated by Google)
It's the best beach bar in Ojo de Agua. I just think they're a bit steep on the kiosk prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbjUtb213RRAB

reviews.comment:
Deberían haber mejor entrada y salida de la estación

(Translated by Google)
There should be better entrances and exits to the station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJcjVxeHRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todos paran se me corto la correa un domingo no venden repuestos pero bombos si mates y chucherías la próxima estación Loreto como a 200 kilometros

(Translated by Google)
Everyone stops, my belt broke on a Sunday, they don't sell spare parts but they do sell drums, yerba mate and sweets, the next station is Loreto about 200 kilometers away

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención de parte de los empleados. A veces corres el riesgo de no conseguir combustible. Complicado si venís de viaje. Buena opción para hacer un alto y descansar..

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very helpful. Sometimes you risk not finding fuel. It's tricky if you're traveling. A good option for a stop and a rest.
